name: USS Euryale (AS 22)
events: 10 Jun 1944 Around 1400 K/10, USS Seahorse (T/Cdr. S.D. Cutter, USN) arrived at Seeadler Harbour, Manus, Admiralty Islands from Brisbane.
Some minor voyage repairs were made by USS Euryale (T/Capt. H.A. Guthrie, USN). (2)
18 Oct 1944 At 1220 I/18, USS Hawkbill (T/Cdr. W. Scanland, Jr., USN) ended her first war patrol at Fremantle, Australia.
She was escorted in by HMAS Parkes (Lt.Cdr. N.O. Vidgen, RANR) which had joined around 1000 I/18.
At Fremantle she was taken in hand by USS Euryale (T/Capt. H.A. Guthrie, USN) for a refit. (3)
15 Feb 1945 Around 0700 H/15, USS Hardhead (T/Cdr. F.A. Greenup, USN) ended her 3rd war patrol at Fremantle.
At Fremantle she was taken in hand for refit by Submarine Division 181 and USS Euryale (T/Cdr. R.R. Gurley, USN). (4)

20 Mar 1945 USS Blower (Cdr. J.H. Campbell, USN) ended her 1st war patrol at Fremantle, Australia. She was escorted in by HMAS ML 812 (Lt. D.G. Phillips, RANR). At Fremantle she was refitted by a relief crew of SubDiv 182 and USS Euryale.
